text.title: Continuous Delivery (Index) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team jumps to cd-pipelines, ships YAML, prod blows up on day 2.
antipattern.fix: Run principles-first; install missing prereqs before pipeline YAML.

antipattern.symptom: Team reads cd-basics for 3 weeks and never ships pipeline.
antipattern.fix: Time-box principles read; move to pipeline-when-ready as soon as audit passes.

antipattern.symptom: Agent loads this router on every CD prompt even when the child is obvious.
antipattern.fix: Skip this methodology when the next child is known.
